title: Ultramarines (Legends)
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: The Ultramarines are the most celebrated of all the Space Marine Chapters, paragons of discipline and honour who guard the realm of Ultramar against every threat the galaxy can muster. This collection gathers tales of the Chapter's greatest heroes across novellas, short stories and prose adaptations of audio dramas. Lord Macragge Marneus Calgar, the proud Captain Cato Sicarius, the legendary scout-sergeant Torias Telion, the fiery Chaplain Cassius and the seer Tigurius all take their turn at the centre of the story, facing tyranid swarms, alien raiders and the enemies of mankind on a dozen battlefields. Together the stories paint a portrait of what it means to wear the blue of Ultramar and bear the burden of its legend.
